subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and from its contents was learned the sorrow of thy heart. Though strangers be the target of affliction's arrows, they find comfort from no direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما واصل شد و از مضمون بالام قلب محزون اطلاع حاصل گشت ... بيگانگان هر چند نشانه تير بلايند ولی از هيچ جهت تسلّی خاطر ندارند
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah
